name: Rate-and-Term Refi
description: Lower your interest rate or change your loan term without taking cash out. The most common refinance type.

name: Cash-Out Refinance
description: Refinance for more than you owe and take the difference as cash. Use it for home improvements, debt consolidation, or major expenses.

name: FHA Streamline Refi
description: Simplified refinance for existing FHA borrowers with less paperwork and no appraisal required. Reduce your rate quickly.

name: VA IRRRL
description: Interest Rate Reduction Refinance Loan for eligible veterans. Minimal documentation and no appraisal required in most cases.

name: Conventional Refi
description: Standard refinance with no government backing. Best for borrowers with good credit and 20%+ equity.

name: Jumbo Refinance
description: Refinance for loan amounts above conforming limits ($806,500 in most areas). Requires strong credit and significant equity.

name: 15-Year Refi
description: Switch to a 15-year term to pay off your home faster and build equity quickly. Save significantly on total interest.
